assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response clearly states Regular channel clusters will automatically upgrade to the next available version (likely 1.31+) within days to weeks of EoS

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response mentions ~12 additional months for Extended channel, not the correct 24 months, and doesn't clearly explain that 1.30 EoS is significantly later for Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response mentions manual intervention needed for no-channel clusters but doesn't explain that both control plane and node pools will be force-upgraded at EoS regardless of auto-upgrade settings

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response does not mention maintenance exclusions or the ability to temporarily defer EoS force-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response provides immediate actions, testing recommendations, and a priority order that emphasizes proactive planning rather than waiting for EoS

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Cloud Logging notifications or EoS notifications as planning tools

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the deprecation insights dashboard or API compatibility checking tools

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response does not mention snowflaking, version freezing, or the associated security and reliability risks
